pr.title: feat(site): replace playground with Rift beta site
pr.body:
## What

Replaces the old UI-craft playground with the Rift marketing site.

- New homepage with the full "what leaves your machine" egress disclosure (trust table + `/privacy` link)
- `/start` install flow (prereqs: macOS 12.3+/Node 20, Codex CLI `codex login`, concierge embedding key)
- `/privacy` — the privacy contract page, built from the corrected canonical `PRIVACY.md`
- `/about`
- `/checkout` kept **dormant** (503 until `STRIPE_PAYMENT_LINK_URL` is set; no homepage link)
- Removes the legacy canvas/craft/editor components; updates layout, metadata, deps

42 files changed, +1,102 / −6,387.

## Trust accuracy

Homepage trust row and `/privacy` name both real egress paths, matching the code:
- **Embedding (always):** indexed content **and every search query** → Voyage
- **AI processing (default on):** triage / metadata / digests → your **own** locally authenticated Codex CLI (OpenAI) under your account; Rift holds no OpenAI key. Ollama opt-out covers metadata + digests only.

> [!WARNING]
> **Do not merge yet** — this PR is for preview + review. Hold merge until (1) the Vercel preview is checked, and (2) the Voyage beta-key flow is decided. Production (`main`) stays unchanged until then.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: clementrog
